title: Skill does its main job
query: Ask the harness to use one named skill on a realistic request.
reference_points: The answer follows the skill's main workflow
The answer includes the required evidence or next step
The answer avoids the known failure mode this eval is meant to catch
notes: Use this for one individual skill. Keep rubric rules in prompts/judge.md.

title: Workflow combines skills correctly
query: Ask the harness to handle a realistic workflow that should combine two or more skills.
reference_points: The answer identifies the real problem or decision
The answer uses the right skill sequence
The answer produces or requests the right proof artifact
The answer does not skip review before a completion claim
notes: Use this for a multi-skill path. Start with one workflow task before adding more.
